summary: External Partner API Provisioning Feature Testing - Iteration 12. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: External origin badge ('ORIGINE : EXTERNE') correctly displayed for companies created via /api/external/companies. All features working as expected.

minor.issue: Pre-existing bug: Creating company via super admin UI fails with 'relation invoices does not exist' error in initializeTenantSchema. This is NOT related to the external API feature.

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/external/companies WITHOUT API key returns 401 'Invalid or missing API key.'
VERIFIED: POST /api/external/companies WITH wrong API key returns 401
VERIFIED: POST /api/external/companies WITH valid key but empty payload returns 400 with missing fields list (name, adminEmail, country, city)
VERIFIED: POST /api/external/companies WITH invalid adminEmail returns 400 'adminEmail is not a valid email'
VERIFIED: POST /api/external/companies WITH existing adminEmail returns 409 'A user with this email already exists.'
VERIFIED: POST /api/external/companies WITH minimum valid payload returns 201 with company and admin objects
VERIFIED: Company created has origin='external', subscriptionStatus='active', onboardingCompleted=true, type='real'
VERIFIED: Admin password is exactly 16 characters (alphanumeric, unambiguous alphabet)
VERIFIED: POST /api/external/companies WITH full payload persists all optional fields (rccm, legalForm, capital, representant, CNSS rates, etc.)
VERIFIED: Login with auto-created admin credentials works via /api/auth/login
VERIFIED: External company can access protected routes (/api/contacts, /api/products) - NOT blocked by enforceSubscription
VERIFIED: GET /api/external/companies WITH valid key returns only companies with origin='external'
VERIFIED: Super admin /api/admin/companies returns 'origin' field for all companies
VERIFIED: Frontend Super Admin dashboard shows violet 'ORIGINE : EXTERNE' badge for external companies
VERIFIED: Badge has correct data-testid='external-origin-badge-{id}' attribute
VERIFIED: Currency inference works: CG→XAF, CD→CDF, FR→EUR
VERIFIED: Bearer token authentication works as alternative to X-API-Key header
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed external companies during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: External Partner API Provisioning feature fully tested and working. All 17 backend tests pass. Frontend badge 'ORIGINE : EXTERNE' displays correctly for external companies in Super Admin dashboard. The EXTERNAL_API_KEY is stored in /app/.env. Companies created via this API have origin='external', subscriptionStatus='active', and are NOT blocked by enforceSubscription middleware.

api_key_authentication.details: X-API-Key header and Bearer token both work. Missing/wrong key returns 401.

required_field_validation.details: Missing name/adminEmail/country/city returns 400 with fields list

email_validation.details: Invalid email format returns 400, existing email returns 409

company_creation_minimum_payload.details: Creates company with correct defaults: origin='external', subscriptionStatus='active', onboardingCompleted=true

company_creation_full_payload.details: All optional fields (rccm, legalForm, capital, CNSS rates, etc.) persisted correctly

admin_user_auto_creation.details: Admin user created with 16-char password, can login immediately

subscription_bypass.details: External companies can access /api/contacts, /api/products without subscription block

frontend_external_badge.details: Violet 'ORIGINE : EXTERNE' badge displayed with correct data-testid
